series_metadata.series_title: Vehicle and Equipment Operation Record (Trip Sheets)
series_metadata.series_description: Records of daily activity for vehicles and equipment, includes mileage usage, purpose for vehicle/equipment usage, inspection of vehicle/equipment, name of operator(s) and passenger(s), and any deficiencies listed for that day.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper copy all discrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: paper copy all discrepancies are resolved
